scripts.db:symlinks: mkdir -p wrangler_migration_symlinks && rm -f wrangler_migration_symlinks/* && find drizzle -name migration.sql -type f | while read f; do d=$(basename $(dirname $f)); ln -sfv "../drizzle/${d}/migration.sql" "wrangler_migration_symlinks/${d}.sql"; done
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm db:symlinks && wrangler d1 migrations apply my-database --local --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm db:symlinks && wrangler d1 migrations apply my-database --remote
